title: Delicate Croatian Beef Salad
description: A garlicky, aerated meal-prep salad featuring thinly sliced feather blade beef, pickled cucumbers, and shredded cabbage.
instructions: Thinly slice the feather blade beef into bite‑sized strips.
Place the beef strips in a bowl, add minced garlic, 1 tsp salt, 1/2 tsp pepper, and 1 tsp dried dill; toss to coat and refrigerate for 15 minutes.
While the beef marinates, shred the red cabbage, thinly slice the red onion, and slice the pickled cucumbers.
In a separate bowl, whisk together 1 tbsp olive oil, 1 tbsp lemon juice, and 1 tsp apple cider vinegar.
Add the shredded cabbage, onion, and cucumber slices to the dressing and toss until evenly coated.
Remove the beef from the refrigerator, let it sit at room temperature for 5 minutes, then add it to the vegetable mix.
Sprinkle capers over the salad if desired, then gently fold to combine all ingredients.
Divide the salad into two meal‑prep containers, cover, and refrigerate until ready to eat.
